scenario.title: The Template Filler
scenario.context: You need AI to generate multiple product feature descriptions that all follow the exact same structure. This will be used in a comparison table, so consistency is critical.
scenario.goal: Write a prompt that defines a specific output template/structure that the AI must follow exactly for consistent, usable results.
constraints: Define the exact structure/template to follow
Include an example of the desired format
Specify what to do if information doesn't fit the template
scenario.exampleInput: Features to describe: 1) Auto-save, 2) Cloud sync, 3) Offline mode. Use case: comparison table on marketing website.
hints: What fields should each feature description have?
How can you show the AI exactly what format you want?
What if a feature doesn't have all the information for every field?

rubric.name: Template Clarity
rubric.description: Is the output template/structure clearly defined?

scoringGuide.excellent: Exact template with field names and structure

rubric.name: Example Provided
rubric.description: Is a concrete example of desired output included?

scoringGuide.excellent: Complete example showing exact expected format
Each field defined with name and expected content type
scoringGuide.good: Fields named but content loosely defined

rubric.name: Edge Case Handling
rubric.description: Does the prompt address incomplete or edge-case data?

scoringGuide.excellent: Clear instructions for handling missing/unusual data

evaluatorContext.idealResponse:
Generate feature descriptions for our comparison table. Each feature MUST follow this exact template:

```
FEATURE: [Feature Name]
ONE-LINER: [10 words max - what it does]
BENEFIT: [User-focused benefit, 15 words max]
HOW IT WORKS: [Simple explanation, 20 words max]
BEST FOR: [Target user type]
```

Example (follow this format exactly):
```
FEATURE: Auto-save
ONE-LINER: Automatically saves your work every 30 seconds
BENEFIT: Never lose your progress, even if your device crashes unexpectedly
HOW IT WORKS: Background process detects changes and saves silently to local storage
BEST FOR: Users who work on long documents
```

Features to describe:
1. Auto-save
2. Cloud sync  
3. Offline mode

Rules:
- Maintain identical field names and order
- Keep within word limits (count them)
- If a field doesn't apply, write 'N/A' rather than omitting it
- Use sentence case, not title case
- No bullet points or sub-lists within fields
commonMistakes: Forgetting to handle incomplete data cases
antiPatterns: Assuming AI knows your preferred format
